meta.purpose: Targeted supplement for pipeline_v2_fix_spec Beat 4 and Beat 7 repairs

papers.title: Scaling LLM Test-Time Compute Optimally can be More Effective than Scaling Model Parameters
search_queries: Scaling LLM Test-Time Compute Optimally can be More Effective than Scaling Model Parameters
papers.key_finding: Provides direct evidence that optimally scaling inference-time compute can outperform scaling model parameters, making test-time compute a genuine competing mechanism.

integration.role_in_narrative: Core Beat 7 anchor for the claim that inference-time compute can substitute for scale and must be treated as a rival explanation.
integration.suggested_citation_note: Snell et al. (2024) on optimal test-time compute scaling

papers.title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models
search_queries: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models
papers.key_finding: Canonical chain-of-thought paper establishing that inference-time reasoning scaffolds can substantially improve reasoning performance without changing training data.

integration.role_in_narrative: Canonical CoT foundation required when scoping data-composition claims against inference-time rivals.

papers.title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback
search_queries: Constitutional AI Harmlessness from AI Feedback
papers.key_finding: Canonical RLAIF paper showing that AI feedback can substitute for direct human feedback on bounded alignment goals, so Beat 4 must keep its claim narrower than universal human-data necessity.

integration.role_in_narrative: Beat 4 counterevidence anchor for bounded-task AI-feedback success.

papers.title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning
search_queries: DeepSeek-R1 Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning
papers.key_finding: Open-weight reasoning model demonstrating that strong inference-time reasoning gains are reproducible outside a proprietary system, strengthening Beat 7's competing-mechanism case.

integration.role_in_narrative: Open-weight replication anchor showing inference-time reasoning improvements are not a one-off proprietary artifact.

papers.title: s1: Simple test-time scaling
papers.key_finding: Shows that simple curated examples plus more inference-time budget can materially improve reasoning, directly sharpening the data-composition versus compute-scaling alternative explanation.

integration.role_in_narrative: Compact Beat 7 anchor linking curated examples and test-time scaling as a credible rival to data-composition claims.
